logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_ack' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_req' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_din' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_addr' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'ind' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'data' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'en' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'rs' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'dummy_tmr_out' will be exposed as RTL port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'mem_req' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'mem_addr' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'data' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'en' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'rs' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'dummy_tmr_out' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.
WARNING: [XFORM 203-561] 'Loop-1' (lcddrv.c:185:8) in function 'lcddrv' is an infinite loop.
